spec.description: WatchlistSpec is the user-authored body of a Watchlist stored object.

patterns.description:
Patterns are the match patterns the watchlist enforces. At least one is
required.

severity.description:
Severity is one of "info", "warn", "crit". Defaults to "info" when empty
(filled in by Mutate).

title.description: Title is the human-readable name of the watchlist. Required.
